news.t: Europe's Defense IPOs Are Hot, Too. 5 to Watch.
European defense stocks are cooling off after the military spending boom. Here's what's next
European Defense Stocks Rally. 3 Particularly Bullish Charts.
Europe's Defense Stocks Cool. These 2 Are Still Taking Off.
Russia's latest attacks provide fresh impetus for European defense stocks
Tuttle Capital Management Launches European Aerospace and Defense Industry ETF

holdings.infoBox: EUAD is an equity ETF with a total of 33 individual holdings. The top holdings are Umb Money Market stock at 67.16%, Airbus SE at 5.60%, MTU Aero Engines AG at 4.43%, Leonardo S.p.a. at 3.23%, and BAE Systems at 3.14%.

overview.description: The Select STOXX Europe Aerospace & Defense ETF (EUAD) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in industrials equity. The fund tracks a narrow index of European stocks, or ADRs of companies headquartered in Europe, who derive a significant portion of their revenue from the aerospace and defense industry. Holdings are weighted based on market-cap. EUAD was launched on Oct 22, 2024 and is issued by Tuttle Capital.
infoTable: STOXX Europe TMI / Aerospace & Defense - SEC

data.title: Europe's Defense IPOs Are Hot, Too. 5 to Watch.
data.text: Europe's defense offerings are dwarfed in scale by SpaceX, Anthropic, or OpenAI. They may prove no less important in fate-of-the-world terms, though.

data.title: European defense stocks are cooling off after the military spending boom. Here's what's next
data.text: Defense stocks in Europe have struggled in 2026 against the broader index. Analysts see 2026 as a period of consolidation in which investors have become more selective on winners.

data.title: European Defense Stocks Rally. 3 Particularly Bullish Charts.
data.text: A German contractor, Italian aerospace name, and British defense company.

data.title: Europe's Defense Stocks Cool. These 2 Are Still Taking Off.
data.text: Rheinmetall is the top contractor to Germany, which is spending more on defense, while Leonardo is a top name in electronics defense systems.

data.title: Russia's latest attacks provide fresh impetus for European defense stocks
data.text: European nations are bracing for hostilities to be extended. Policies to increase military spending and preparedness are in motion.

data.title: Tuttle Capital Management Launches European Aerospace and Defense Industry ETF
data.text: GREENWICH, Conn., Oct. 22, 2024 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- via IBN -- The Select STOXX Europe Aerospace & Defense ETF (the “Fund”) will start trading today.
